Bank stocks are soaring on the steeper-curve/stimulus narrative. Clean energy names are breaking out on policy expectations. This is a reflationary bull market environment at the start of a new political cycle — be deployed, not in cash.

new_positions.thesis: Palantir is the AI/data analytics platform layer that governments and large enterprises depend on for decision intelligence — a differentiated position from our existing tech holdings (TSM = foundry, MU = memory, PLTR = analytics application layer). Three thesis legs: (1) Government durability — PLTR's Gotham platform is deeply embedded in US defense, intelligence, and COVID response infrastructure. The Biden administration's emphasis on data-driven governance (vaccine logistics, defense modernization, pandemic response) extends government revenue visibility for years. Contracts of this type are not discretionary and have high renewal rates. (2) Commercial acceleration — Palantir's Foundry platform is demonstrating enterprise scalability beyond government, with accelerating client additions. This de-risks the long-term story as commercial revenue begins to offset the lumpiness of government contracts. (3) AI infrastructure moat — PLTR's ontology-based data model creates a structural switching cost: once a large enterprise or government agency organizes critical operational data inside PLTR's framework, the replacement cost is enormous. As AI becomes central to enterprise operations, PLTR's platform becomes more valuable, not less. Technical setup: ADX=42 (strong trend), MACD bullish, OBV rising — clean institutional accumulation signal. RSI=61 is not overbought. This is a textbook entry: strong trend, institutional backing, no extended RSI.

lessons: Re-entry thesis time-validity window: When re-entering a position based on a specific technical reversal signal (OBV reversal from falling to rising + ADX recovering), set a 4-week validity window for that accumulation signal to hold. If OBV resumes falling or ADX collapses within this window, the re-entry thesis was false — exit immediately without waiting for further confirmation. The false re-entry risk is compounded by psychological anchoring to the original exit rationale. Trigger: Any position where a re-entry was made specifically on technical accumulation reversal, and the accumulation signal reverses within 4 weeks of entry.

lessons: Lesson 10: Post-entry ADX collapse as thesis-evaporation exit signal — when a position is entered on ADX > 35 institutional accumulation, monitor ADX trajectory post-entry.
